title: fix: /image/{name or id}/json returns RootFS layers

comments.body: I just added some nil checks, `info.RootFS` should be always non-`nil`, not sure about `info.RootFS.Layers`. But better safe than sorry.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *matejvasek*, *mheon*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
